text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Sweep Tosho has seized countless
victories and cast many a spell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are riding a train to the hot spring
vacation we won in the shopping district's raffle.
choice_data_list:
Are you sure you're okay not going to an
amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, they do say hot springs are good for when
you're all worn out. Plus, I can go to an
amusement park whenever I want...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What's it to you, anyway? I just changed my mind
is all!
...Hm. Are we there yet?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I know. I'll use some magic to make the train go
faster!
"Get there in an instant! Alstroemeria! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Familiar. Help me make my incantation
stronger! First, get the cards out of the bag!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Once you find them... we're gonna play a game!
Hehe. Just so you know, I'm pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, is the joker on the left or the right? I can
tell by looking at your face, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Don't try and throw me off with a funny
face! That's against the rules!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe Sweep's spell is working, as the hours fly
by like magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
See? We got here right away once we started
playing cards! My spell worked like a charm!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, so this is where we're staying? I'm gonna
look around every corner of this inn!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The shopping district did an awesome job
getting an inn like this involved!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The bath's gigantic! I bet I could swim in there!
Oh, I wanna go to the arcade too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
There's so much I haven't even seen yet! I'm
gonna go explore a little more!
choice_data_list: Make sure you don't get lost!
Make sure you don't get lost!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Who do you think I am?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must have fallen asleep at some point. I guess all
the recent fatigue is catching up with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knock on the door to the next room, but it
doesn't seem like Sweep Tosho has come back
yet, so I decide to go look for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk through the inn and spot Sweep Tosho
stepping out of the locker room.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! You finally woke up! You were sleeping
like a baby, so I figured I'd go take a bath!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...? What? What're you making that face for?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What?! Me?! Lost?! And here I was, trying to be
consi—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Forget it! I'm going back to my room! You go take
a bath and cool your head!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Dummy! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure that getting in the hot spring will
only make my head hotter... At any rate, I decide
to follow her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knock, but there's no answer. Left with no
choice, I open the door...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwump!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pffft... Hahaha! You look so dopey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She threw a pillow at me the second I opened the
door!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You've just gotta have a pillow fight when you
stay at an inn! Here comes another!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Oh no, my familiar's mad! Sooo
scaaaaary!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We play around for a bit before eating dinner.
Afterwards, I decide to take that bath I've been
putting off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, Sweep Tosho has been
on her best behavior today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was fine with getting up early to catch the
train, walked from the academy to the train
station without complaint...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she didn't throw a single tantrum, even when
she had to stand for most of the train ride.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, without even trying to wake me, she took a
bath all on her own. And when we were in her
room, she was in such a good mood that we had a
pillow fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we first won the coupon for the hot spring,
she said she'd rather go to an amusement park,
but she ended up being the one who suggested
coming here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this is her way of showing her
appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho and I have spent three years
together. It's not a short amount of time, and I
feel that she's maturing a little more each day.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Why do we have separate rooms?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We're having a sleepover, but we can't even chat
late into the night!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I've got a big, Japanese-style room, but the
corners are kinda dark!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And just so we're clear—I'm not afraid or
anything! I was coping fine! ...I'm just really bored!
choice_data_list: Want to talk until you get sleepy?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
W-well, all right. I mean, I bet you're bored too,
right? Yeah. Okay, I'll stay with you until you're
ready to sleep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We have a relaxed chat until we both feel sleepy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three years have passed... Some things have
changed. Some things haven't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Sweep Tosho and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
